title: World's Longest Par $$3$$
body: The tee of the world's longest par $$3$$ sits atop South Africa's Hanglip Mountain at $$400.0$$ $$m$$ above the green and can only be reached by helicopter. The horizontal distance to the green is $$359.0$$ $$m$$. Neglect air resistance.
lesson: 4. Motion in Two and Three Dimensions
